mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ALARM (ALARM_ID, DEVICE_ID, ALARM_TYPE, ALARM_LEVEL, STATUS, ALARM_TIME) VALUES (SEQ_ALARM.NEXTVAL, #{deviceId}, #{alarmType}, #{alarmLevel}, #{status}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE ALARM SET STATUS = '已确认', HANDLER_ID = #{userId}, HANDLE_TIME = SYSDATE WHERE ALARM_ID = #{alarmId}
UPDATE ALARM SET STATUS = '已解决', HANDLER_ID = #{userId}, HANDLE_TIME = SYSDATE WHERE ALARM_ID = #{alarmId}
